description: Canonical known-credential shapes shared by src/main/services/logger.ts (scrubSecrets) and scripts/secret-grep.mjs (the G4 gate) — ONE list, so the gate can never test different shapes than the scrubber. ORDER MATTERS: the more specific sk- prefixes must precede the generic sk- pattern, or the generic one could match first and leave a recognizable prefix behind. Each pattern is anchored tightly enough that ordinary log text — Windows paths, UUIDs, 40-char git SHAs, chorus/<repo>/<8hex> branch names — survives unchanged (guarded by logger.test.ts). Prefixes verified against provider docs at execution (D4).
